name: Diamond Patterned Shag Woven Rug - Threshold™
description:
Whether you are styling a new room or want to give an existing one an elegant finish touch, the Diamond Patterned Shag Woven Rug from Threshold™ is just the thing. This shag rug is decorated with a large sketch-like diamond pattern on a contrast-color base for a cool, modern look. The fade- and stain-resistant construction helps keep it looking its best for longer, and the low pile height allows for easy cleaning and placement wherever you like.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
